first_two_for_report.original_text: I ordered this card, along with another. They shipped the same morning I purchased them. The next morning the tracking on USPS said it was delivered but it was not. I emailed Amazon with the problem and they sent out new cards right away. The new cards arrived the next morning at my door, via UPS. 2 days later, the original order showed up. Inside the box of the original order was a a black box with an orange ribbon gift bow and with Amazon`s logo allover. When I opened the box, there was a white gift card with a snow globe and Amazon`s logo in the middle. It was beautiful and Amazon`s customer service, via e-mail was amazing and lightening fast. Happy Holidays.
first_two_for_report.summary: The customer received two identical cards from different shipping companies, which were then incorrectly tracked to be delivered. After emailing Amazon for assistance, the company promptly sent out new cards that arrived the next day. Upon opening the box, they found a beautifully designed gift card with a snow globe and Amazon's logo. The experience was described as "amazing" and "lightning fast." The customer is happy with

first_two_for_report.original_text: I wanted to purchase a gift card as a wedding present.  After reading about the gift card gaffes, I thought I would try the "print at home" version.  I have successfully done this a year ago for a baby shower gift.  When Amazon sent the email to "print at home," it said I needed to download Adobe Acrobat.  I have had trouble with Adobe since its inception.  However, I tried.  My computer would not allow the download because of issues with McAfee Security.  I called (on the phone) Amazon, told them the problems I was having, and they have credited my account and hopefully resolved the issue.  They could not have been nicer.  This is my first problem with Amazon.  I shall continue to be a loyal Amazon shopper, but will stay away from gift card purchases on-line.
first_two_for_report.summary: Summary: The reviewer purchased a gift card as a wedding present, initially expecting a print-at-home option. Upon trying the "print at home" version, they encountered difficulties due to software compatibility issues. Despite attempts to resolve these problems through Amazon's support team, the experience did not meet their expectations. The reviewer now considers Amazon's online gift card purchases less appealing than traditional in-store options.

all_reviews.original_text: I had the awful experience of getting a phone call from the person I bought the card for and hearing that her card wasn't activated. only to call Amazon and hear that i'll have to wait 2-3 day before i know if they will give me my money back for the bad card. now i have to call and make sure the other gift cards I gave out were activated, Yay.... Long time amazon customer not happy at all with the customer service answer, with what should be an easy reply. I have to wait 2-3 day to find out if they are giving me my money back, Guess if i ever buy another gift Card from Amazon I will have to double check to make sure it's activated before I give out. So I don't have Embarrassed friends and or  family having to but back part or all of there purchases. after rant all i can say is disappointed.
all_reviews.summary: Customer experiences with Amazon's customer service regarding card activation issues and delayed refunds are disappointing.

all_reviews.original_text:
These gift card holders are egg-cellent! (sorry) I was surprised by the size - it's as big as my face!  You pull the egg from the top and bottom and it slides open with a "pop", displaying the gift card inside.  The printing is professional and the magenta areas are actually shiny/glossy.  It's made of thick, high quality card stock and should hold up to the tugging of almost any child - in fact, you could probably reuse it a number of times.  There's plenty of space on the back to write a message, so there's no need to spend money on a separate greeting card.  The card also has no branding, so you can replace the Amazon gift card with some other gift card if you wish.  The cartoon chicken and the bright colors will appeal to young children, but it's also mature & simplistic enough to be appropriate for a teen or adult.  I was very impressed by the quality of an item that is essentially free, and I definitely recommend this for an Easter present or any egg-related holiday.

The item came completely undamaged in a sealed plastic cover and was well protected during shipping, but YMMV.  Sometimes Amazon's gift card tins arrive dented and scratched, and other times they're in perfect condition - it all depends on the person who packages and handles it.
all_reviews.summary: These gift card holders are excellent! They come in a sealed plastic cover and are well-protected during shipping.

all_reviews.original_text: I received an E-Gift card for amazon for Christmas and was told I could spend it on anything, including a gift card to another store. Me being the 17 self I am, I decided to spend it on a sephora E-Gift card. I was thinking about spending it on an actual sephora gift card, but I am very impatient so I decided this would be quicker. I read the reviews and was very very hesitant about buying this seeing as they're so many negative reviews. But I did it anyway and received it within 3 minutes. I immediately opened the email and check the balance on Sephora's website and it was 50$. Thank you so much!!! I can't wait to see what I purchase with this!! If you are hesitant on buying because of the negative reviews, please bite the bullet it and buy it!! And to those that had a different outcome, I'm very sorry and I truly hope you got your money back, or were able to get a sephora gift card in the end.
all_reviews.summary: The reviewer spent their Amazon E-Gift card on a Sephora gift card, receiving it quickly and without hesitation despite multiple negative reviews. They express excitement about the experience and plan to use it again.

all_reviews.original_text: I ordered this card, along with another. They shipped the same morning I purchased them. The next morning the tracking on USPS said it was delivered but it was not. I emailed Amazon with the problem and they sent out new cards right away. The new cards arrived the next morning at my door, via UPS. 2 days later, the original order showed up. Inside the box of the original order was a white envelope with Amazon`s logo . When I opened the envelope, there was a card with a Christmas image on the front and an empty blank white envelope. When I opened the card, there was a white gift card with a snow globe and Amazon`s logo in the middle. It was beautiful and Amazon`s customer service, via e-mail was amazing and lightening fast. Happy Holidays.
all_reviews.summary: The customer received two identical cards from different shipping companies that were supposed to be delivered together, but one arrived as a separate package instead. Despite the delay, the customer found the original order inside the white envelope with the Amazon logo, which turned out to be a Christmas-themed gift card. The experience was described as "amazing" and "lightning fast" by the customer.

all_reviews.original_text:
Stay away from this one...

When we went to use the card they said the balance was $0.  They told me to call back on Monday when their manager was in.  You cannot check your balance online and have to call a 1-888 number.  When you call they are unable to help you because you don't receive a PIN number with the gift card. Maybe this will be resolved on Monday, but what a waste of time.  I am just glad I didn't give this card to someone who ran into these problems.

Also, you cannot order online using gift cards.
all_reviews.summary: Summary: The reviewer strongly advises against purchasing gift cards due to issues with balance checking and online ordering capabilities.

all_reviews.original_text: I work for a community health center and we've recently started a program to acknowledge our employees in the milestones in their lives. When discussing what to include, it was an easy decision to go with Starbucks. You can't go wrong with coffee, especially in the Seattle area.  These $10 gift cards will be included with a card to the employees on their yearly anniversaries. The 4 pack is great because they come in the denomination that we agreed on. We have over 50 employees in our department so I'm able to order a few packs and be set for a couple months. I also enjoy being able to order them online as it saves me the hassle of having to stop at an actual store every time I need to get more.
all_reviews.summary: The reviewer found Starbucks gift cards to be a great choice for recognizing employees' milestones, particularly in the Seattle area. They appreciate the convenience of ordering multiple packs online, which saves time and reduces stress.

all_reviews.original_text:
If you are thinking of signing up for The ECA, stop now! Don't do it. To become a member they conveniently need your credit card info, and they also conveniently keep it without anyway for you to take it down other than a written letter. They also auto-renew your info! Guess what though? The only way to cancel is to send your cancellation letter (real certified letter, snail mail) 30 days before your auto renewal, however they inform you if they received the letter 30 days before your account is ready to auto-renew. SO say you send a letter, but they do not recieve it, you automatically get charged 20 bucks because they sent you the letter informing of your auto renewal after the period for you to cancel. VERY CONVENIENT!

There are many memberships and organizations out there where you can cancel online, how can a consumer advocacy group do this without looking like a fool?

Well damage is done, if you really wish to associate yourself with a fraudulent consumer advocacy group, go right ahead, but don't say I didn't warn you.
all_reviews.summary: Summary: The ECA's convenience features are misleading and unnecessary. The company requires credit card information, keeps it confidential, and offers automatic renewals. However, consumers should never send letters to cancel their membership. Instead, contact the organization directly or use alternative methods such as contacting the fraud department.

all_reviews.original_text:
There's nothing wrong with the gift per se but the redemption procedure is a nightmare, starting with the customer service in India and the whole process of:
- Searching on the website and spending hours to find the information needed (which is not at all easy to find);
- Chatting with a moron who barely understands and copies and pastes standard replies in bad English;
- Sending emails and then having to call because they don't understand something as simple as returning a gift card that the gift receiver does not want.
I speak crystal-clear RP and speak quite slowly and still had difficulties making myself understood, and I am used to speaking to foreigners because I was an English teacher for 10 years.
IN SHORT AND TO ROUND UP THIS REVIEW: the gift is fine as long as you don't have to return it.
If you have the slightest doubt as to whether you will need to return it, don't buy it because it will take up inordinate amounts of time and possibly they will suggest crediting the money to your account or a million other things to avoid returning the money and make your life a misery until you either give in or give up.
SECONDLY - IMPORTANT ADVICE: don't send this gift to people you don't know because they might start asking for the recipient's phone number, billing address, secondary email address, or any number of details you don't have.
WE BELIEVED it was a good company gift for clients and promotions, but we were wrong because the return is almost impossible and because they start asking for all sorts of details that you could well have if you have given the card to a relative / friend but not if you are a company giving to clients or giving cards away in promotions.
all_reviews.summary: Summary: The gift is fine as long as you don't have to return it; if unsure, don't buy it. Important advice: do not send to unknown recipients unless asked for specific details.

selected_review.reviewText:
Amazon,
I am shopping for Amazon.com gift cards for Christmas gifts and am really so disappointed that out of five choices there isn't one that says "Merry Christmas" or mentions Christmas at all!  I am sure I am not alone in wanting a card that reflects the actual "holiday" we are celebrating. On principle, I cannot send a Amazon gift card this Christmas.  What's up with all the Political Correctness?  Bad marketing decision.
Lynn

service_response_task.response:
Thank you for your feedback. We understand how disappointing it can be to receive a gift card without any mention of the holiday season. Our goal is always to provide thoughtful and accurate information about our products. 

To rectify this issue, we will add a note on the gift card stating "This gift card represents the festive spirit of Christmas." This should help clarify what the gift card is meant to represent.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to help make your shopping experience as enjoyable as possible.
